full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #8 (2026-04-21)

PULSE
Health: 0.4436 (C). 882 wallets, 141 contributors. 17 memos today vs 126 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
45 reward payments, 315729 PFT distributed to 24 contributors. Top earner: rDVKRN...tyjB (56690 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 19,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,200 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (70,000 PFT, avg 10,000/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (68 memos). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 5 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 83.1%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-22): 7887 transactions from 70 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
